A '''kusak''' was a partially [[Armor/Legends|armored]] predatory [[Canine/Legends|canine]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]. Kusaks usually roamed the rocky terrain hunting in packs. If one tamed a kusak, it was loyal until [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="SWG:K" />

[[Pirate/Legends|Pirate]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] kept two kusaks, named [[Razor (kusak)|Razor]] and [[Scourge (kusak)|Scourge]], as guardians in his [[Nym's Base|palace]].<ref name="SWG:StN">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Nym|Lok}}</ref> A pack of kusaks, including [[Runt (kusak)|Runt]], [[Bedhead]], [[Blinky]], [[Scarecrow (kusak)|Scarecrow]], [[Slobbers]], [[Troubles]], [[Wart Face]], [[Gargle]], [[Ding (kusak)|Ding]] and [[Speedbump]], was also used to guard [[Nym's Stronghold]].<ref name="SWG:CftK">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Caring for the Kusaks}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Kusak_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Kusaks appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
